metadata.description: I am a fullstack developer with experience creating modern, beautiful and dynamic websites and mobile apps. Explore my portfolio to see some of the projects I have worked on and get in touch if you are interested in collaborating on a project together.

description.first: I build scalable web applications and
description.second: focusing on robust architectures and intelligent automation.

about.title: About Me
about.text:
I am a Full Stack developer focused on solving complex business problems through clean code, scalable architectures (DDD), and Artificial Intelligence integration.
I have {{experienceYears}} of professional experience. My approach combines the React/Next.js and Node/NestJS ecosystems with the creation of advanced AI agents (RAG) and voice automations for B2B SaaS products.

experience.title: Experience
experience.description: My professional journey building scalable applications and integrating Artificial Intelligence to solve business problems.

entries.responsibilities: Designed and implemented a RAG-based agent system (OpenAI), reducing manual search time by 90%. Integrated RetellAI and n8n to create an autonomous voice agent that negotiates rates in real-time. Built the platform architecture from scratch.

Led the end-to-end development of a comprehensive medical appointment system. Implemented secure payment flows with MercadoPago and translated complex business requirements into technical features using agile methodologies.

Designed the architecture and developed 2 scalable web applications from scratch. Worked under strict SCRUM agile methodology, collaborating closely with the team to deliver project milestones under high-quality standards.

skillsData.title: TypeScript
skillsData.description: A superset of JavaScript that adds static typing, improving code maintainability, scalability, and error detection.

skillsData.title: React
skillsData.description: Leading library for building interactive user interfaces based on reusable components.

skillsData.title: Next.js
skillsData.description: React framework for scalable web applications with server-side rendering (SSR), static site generation, and SEO.

skillsData.title: Tailwind CSS
skillsData.description: A utility-first CSS framework for rapidly styling applications consistently and with high customizability.

skillsData.title: Zustand
skillsData.description: A small, fast, and scalable bearbones state-management solution for React. Perfect for complex states.

skillsData.title: Node.js
skillsData.description: Server-side JavaScript runtime environment, ideal for building fast and scalable APIs.

skillsData.title: NestJS
skillsData.description: Progressive Node.js framework for building efficient and scalable server-side applications using modular architecture (DDD).

skillsData.title: Supabase
skillsData.description: Open-source Firebase alternative based on PostgreSQL, providing authentication, real-time database, and storage.

skillsData.title: Prisma
skillsData.description: Modern ORM for Node.js and TypeScript that simplifies data modeling, migrations, and type-safe database queries.

skillsData.title: Docker
skillsData.description: Containerization platform that allows packaging applications and their dependencies for secure and consistent deployment.

skillsData.title: PostgreSQL
skillsData.description: Powerful open-source relational database system, known for its robustness, data integrity, and advanced features.

skillsData.title: MongoDB
skillsData.description: Document-oriented NoSQL database, ideal for handling large volumes of unstructured data and flexible schemas.

skillsData.title: Redis
skillsData.description: In-memory data structure store, used as a blazing fast database, cache, and message broker.

skillsData.title: OpenAI
skillsData.description: Integration of GPT models for natural language processing, text generation, and creation of RAG agents.

skillsData.title: Gemini
skillsData.description: Use of Google's multimodal models for long-context analysis, image processing, and intelligent assistance.

skillsData.title: RetellAI
skillsData.description: Development of autonomous, conversational voice agents in real-time, integrating LLMs for B2B flows.

skillsData.title: OpenClaw
skillsData.description: Open-source personal AI assistant that controls your computer via chat apps like Telegram or WhatsApp. Manages emails, calendars, and builds custom skills autonomously.

skillsData.title: n8n
skillsData.description: Node-based workflow automation tool. Building complex pipelines connecting APIs, databases, and AI models.

projects.title: My Projects
projects.description: These are some of my projects, you can find more on my

projects.title: Loadify - AI Core & Voice Automations
projects.description: B2B SaaS platform for logistics. Designed and implemented the AI core with RAG agents (OpenAI) to analyze loads, reducing manual search time by 90%. Integrates an autonomous voice agent (RetellAI) that negotiates rates in real time. Full Stack architecture built from scratch.

projects.title: TLDR Bot - AI Assistant
projects.description: A Telegram bot built with n8n that uses AI (Google Gemini) to generate intelligent summaries of group chats. It can summarize by message count, time range, or topic. It can also analyze and explain messages, images, videos and other files in detail, acting as a personal conversational assistant.

projects.title: NestJS Products Microservice
projects.description: This project is a microservice that provides a RESTful API for managing products, auth, payments and orders. The microservice is built with NestJS and uses MongoDB, Postgresql and mysql as the database.

projects.title: Karma Bot
projects.description: Karma Bot is a simple Telegram bot for tracking karma points in a group chat. Users can give each other karma points by responding to messages with +1 or -1. The bot also provides commands for checking a user's current karma score and for seeing a leaderboard of the top users with the most karma. Built with Node.js and MongoDB.

projects.title: Graggle Bot - Telegram Mini App
projects.description: Native Telegram Mini App farming game. Built from scratch using Next.js and PostgreSQL. The system integrates high-performance caching with Redis to handle high concurrency and uses strongly-typed Server Actions (ZSA). Includes a real-time admin dashboard to manage the game economy and logic.

card.title: Get in touch
card.description: Send me a message and I'll get back to you as soon as possible.

panel.title: Ask questions about Williams
panel.description: I answer using only the public content visible in this portfolio.

prompts.title: Ways to start
items: What kind of developer is Williams?
Which projects are strongest for a recruiter?
What stack does he use best?
